turn off the item to the left of the privacy policy
tap the icon above your privacy is icon

{"text": "Your privacy is important to Mobihome. Mobihome has created this Privacy Policy to understand what information about you is collected, used and disclosed with respect to our app Mobile Real Number Locator.
", "resource-id": "real.caller.mobile.number.locator.tracker.mobihome:id/content", "adapter-view": false, "pointer": "b89f50c", "scrollable-horizontal": false, "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "selected": false, "content-desc": [null], "rel-bounds": [0, 125, 1370, 398], "draw": false, "focusable": false, "long-clickable": false, "visibility": "visible", "focused": false, "clickable": false, "abs-pos": true, "font-family": "default", "class": "real.caller.mobile.number.locator.tracker.mobihome.TextView", "visible-to-user": true, "package": "real.caller.mobile.number.locator.tracker.mobihome", "enabled": true, "bounds": [35, 405, 1405, 678], "pressed": "not_pressed", "scrollable-vertical": false}, {"text": "INFORMATION WE COLLECT & HOW WE USE", "resource-id": "real.caller.mobile.number.locator.tracker.mobihome:id/info", "adapter-view": false, "pointer": "5af2e55", "scrollable-horizontal": false, "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "selected": false, "content-desc": [null], "rel-bounds": [0, 433, 1028, 489], "draw": false, "focusable": false, "long-clickable": false, "visibility": "visible", "focused": false, "clickable": false, "abs-pos": true, "font-family": "default", "class": "real.caller.mobile.number.locator.tracker.mobihome.TextView", "visible-to-user": true, "package": "real.caller.mobile.number.locator.tracker.mobihome", "enabled": true, "bounds": [35, 713, 1063, 769], "pressed": "not_pressed", "scrollable-vertical": false}, {"text": "
We does not store any personal information. 

We may collect non-personal identification information about users such as advertising ID, applications installed by user through our application whenever they interact with our apps. 

Our App also use Google Admob SDK for advertisements.
We also use third-party network advertisers, to deliver ads to you on our behalf. These network advertisers may be supplied with or have access to your non personally identifiable information. 

We  collect information from you to provide our service, and also used to maintain, operate and enhance our mobile apps and to market additional products and services to you. 

We don't share any information with anyone except to comply with the law, develop our products, or protect our rights.
